arts.ttl: Man United must seek permission from local airport before pushing ahead with £2bn 'New Trafford' because of giant masts which may be seen in LIVERPOOL
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY MIKE KEEGAN: The proposals feature three giant masts, which are modelled on the Red Devil's trident on United's crest.

arts.ttl: Why Newcastle star Anthony Gordon isn't playing in the Carabao Cup final vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon isn't included in Newcastle United's squad for their Carabao Cup final clash with Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Who are PIF? Newcastle United's mega rich owners with billions in the bank
arts.sum: At the heart of the transformation and wanting to bring the club into a new era is the Saudi Arabian Public Investment Fund (PIF). Unsurprisingly, the bulk of the money collected into the fund comes from the country's vast oil wealth, but with oil a finite resource, the fund looks to invest in new long-term projects - with their 80% buyout of Newcastle, their first venture into major European sports.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle LIVE: Carabao Cup final match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Reds out to win first silverware under Arne Slot as Magpies hunt first trophy for 70 years at Wembley

arts.ttl: Why do Liverpool supporters boo national anthem? Stance explained ahead of Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Liverpool are into another Wembley cup final and they face Newcastle United this afternoon

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle TV channel - live stream details, kick-off time, highlights
arts.sum: Liverpool are ready to play Newcastle United in the Carabao Cup Final at Wembley this afternoon (4.30pm).

arts.ttl: Newcastle United set to sell £60m man if they fail to qualify for Champions League
arts.sum: Newcastle United could be forced to sell one of their best players if they fail to qualify for the Champions League next season. The Magpies will be involved in the Carabao Cup final today against Liverpool and they have the opportunity to end their long wait for a trophy. arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard sends three-word Carabao Cup final message to Liverpool players
arts.sum: Former Liverpool captain Steven Gerrard has offered his support to the Reds ahead of the Carabao Cup final against Newcastle United at Wembley

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup final prize money: How much Liverpool or Newcastle will get if they win
arts.sum: Liverpool and Newcastle are set to clash at Wembley in the Carabao Cup final, with the winner set to take home some significant prize money as well as the trophy

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah shares Liverpool post-match wish before Carabao Cup final vs Newcastle United
arts.sum: If Mohamed Salah scores today and Liverpool win today's Carabao Cup final, then you know what to expect
